name: Ciara johnson
ai_summary: Ciara Johnson recently entered the childcare field with about two months of experience and a strong passion for working with children, based in Atlanta, GA. She encourages sharing to resolve conflicts, has a child of her own, and plans to further her childcare education; available for both full-time and part-time shifts within a 10-15 mile radius.
